case_title: PENG, MEI FENG vs. LUONG, AARON KIM SON et al

docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF DEC-13-1995, CONTINUED TO JAN-11-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT BY 12/29/95. PLAINTIFF TO NOTIFY DEFT. OF NEW DATE IF NECESSARY. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
